items.briefing:
Australia's Five Eyes intelligence partners have warned that AI is making cyber threats faster and harder to detect — a risk relevant to all Australian organisations, including training providers. Separately, a new ransomware group called "Gentlemen" is supplying tools to attackers that disable security software, making infections harder to stop once they begin. WhatsApp users are also being targeted by phishing attacks using fake business documents designed to compromise PCs.

**Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected document via WhatsApp — even from what appears to be a legitimate contact — do not open it until you've verified the sender through a separate channel.

featured.title: Five Eyes cyber agencies warn AI is accelerating cyber risk
featured.quote: Five Eyes agencies warn AI is accelerating cyber risks, directly impacting Australian organisation security strategies.
